Trigger ConclusionAgent for final dossier assembly

constraints_and_notes.rate_limiting: Enrichment scripts hit API rate limits (GitHub, arXiv, HuggingFace); parallel execution recommended
constraints_and_notes.data_freshness: Websites and LinkedIn profiles may be stale; enrichment script uses Wayback Machine for historical perspective
constraints_and_notes.verification_coverage: 3/36 companies completed through full dossier; remaining 33 need enrichment→analysis→conclusions
